results.justification: Scalable fingerprinting directly supports multiple fingerprint payloads — DIRECT TWIN of MOKO-FINGERPRINT's multi-attribute encoding.
Studies robustness of LLM fingerprints to adversarial tampering — addresses graceful-degradation property.

results.matched_effect_cluster: ADD multi-bit image watermark orthogonal components
results.justification: Multi-bit watermark with MUTUALLY ORTHOGONAL watermark components encoding owner+user+timestamp+IP — DIRECT TWIN of MOKO's multi-attribute orthogonal encoding (just in image domain).

results.matched_effect_cluster: LM watermark many adaptive users payload tracking
results.justification: Watermarking LMs for many adaptive users with per-user payload tracking — multi-payload + per-user attribute encoding.
Orthogonal watermark components for message bits — same orthogonal-attribute principle.
Multi-bit watermark transferable across models; payload encoding adjacent to MOKO multi-attribute.
Fingerprint via semantically conditioned watermark — different mechanism but same artefact.
